agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 195 SHIPPED US-314 passes:true (Sprint 29 / V0.27.3 P3 final story -- drive_counter server-side sync gap, B-064). DESIGN: top-level driveCounter payload field rather than extending SNAPSHOT_TABLES (would expand scope beyond P3) or piggybacking inside drive_summary (tight coupling). New pushDriveCounter() method on Pi SyncClient + new runDriveCounterUpsert() helper on server using GREATEST (MariaDB) / MAX (SQLite) for monotonic upsert. The forward-only invariant guards against rewinds because analytics joins on drive_id corrupt silently if the counter rewinds (stale sync after a fresher one). PRE-FLIGHT MAPPED ARCHITECTURE: DELTA_SYNC_TABLES (append-only monotonic INTEGER PK) vs SNAPSHOT_TABLES (TEXT-keyed upsert; currently SKIPPED with post-US-194 TODO). drive_counter is NEITHER -- it's a single-row INTEGER state mirror (CHECK id=1). PM grounding 'Likely same Sweep-5 wiring drift family as US-304 + US-306' was MISLEADING -- drive_counter was NEVER in IN_SCOPE_TABLES on Pi or _TABLE_REGISTRY on server, and there was no DriveCounter ORM model on the server. The US-200 catch-up migration created the raw DDL table but no sync writer ever advanced it. ROOT CAUSE: drive_counter sync was never wired (not a regression). PM SCOPE.FILESTOUCH was 2 files (src/pi/data/sync_log.py UPDATE, test NEW); ACTUAL was 7 files (3 src/ + 4 tests/). Documented as BL-010 scope drift in feedback.filesActuallyTouched. PM scope phantom-path -- src/pi/data/sync_log.py is bookkeeping for delta-by-PK syncs and drive_counter is a singleton that doesn't fit IN_SCOPE_TABLES; actual wire-up is src/pi/sync/client.py. NEW: tests/pi/sync/test_drive_counter_sync.py (7 tests / 2 classes; integration test asserts forcePush emits driveCounter; defensive missing-table case; counter-only-no-data case; pushDriveCounter direct-API surface for OK/EMPTY/DISABLED/FAILED). NEW: tests/server/test_drive_counter_sync.py (13 tests / 4 classes; ORM model contract + Pydantic surface + runDriveCounterUpsert covering fresh-insert + advance + GREATEST guard against rewind + idempotency + singleton invariant). RED phase: pytest collection failed with ImportError 'cannot import name DriveCounterData from src.server.api.sync' on server-side test before any test ran; Pi-side test asserts pre-fix forcePush emitted no driveCounter field. GREEN phase: 20 new tests + 2 existing-test scope-addition bumps (test_sync_force_push table count IN_SCOPE_TABLES -> +1; test_db_models 19 -> 20 tables). Full fast suite 4225 passed / 17 skipped / 0 failed (was 4205 baseline post-US-312; +20 new). Ruff clean across all 7 modified files. sprint_lint 0 err / 1 informational warn (carryover from US-312 size-vs-filesToTouch ratio; not US-314). KNOWN LIMITATION: server drive_counter table is single-row across devices (no source_device column). Multi-device deployment would have devices overwrite each other; today only chi-eclipse-01 in production so acceptable. Adding source_device requires schema migration -- out of scope for B-064 P3. REAL-WORLD VALIDATION GATE: post-V0.27.3 deploy + next IRL drive sync -> server `SELECT last_drive_id FROM drive_counter` advances to current Pi value within 60s. SPRINT 29 P1+P3 STACK COMPLETE 4 of 4 (US-310 + US-311 + US-312 + US-314). EXIT <promise>COMPLETE</promise> -- all sprint stories passes:true; sprint done.

agents.name: Agent2
agents.note: Sprint 25 / Session 158 -- US-286 SHIPPED passes:true. tests/pi/integration/test_engine_drive_capture_e2e.py (1 class / 1 test / 7 phases): real ApplicationOrchestrator + DriveDetector + SummaryRecorder + ObdDataLogger; mock surface = connection.obd.query (BT edge) only; 0.16s call duration vs 30-sec budget. Mirrors US-260 cold-start pattern. Discriminator: would FAIL against May-4-5 production regression class (DriveDetector never operational) + against any silent realtime_data write regression. Two gotchas surfaced for future tests: (1) e2e fixtures must seed profiles('daily') because realtime_data has FK + bare orchestrator doesn't run ProfileManager; (2) production order query->logReading->_handleReading means first N ticks land with drive_id NULL -- query realtime_data without drive_id filter. Standing by post-US-286.
